channel.title: Basis on Not a Peeker of Nature
channel.description: Recent content in Basis on Not a Peeker of Nature

item.title: Basis_of_computer
item.description: BIOS BIOS stands for ‘Basic Input/Output System’. Whether SVM mode (for AMD; VT-x for Intel) is enabled in BIOS can affect the functionality of wsl2. Computer hardware Key components to assemble a computer and their functions: 1. Motherboard The motherboard is the main printed circuit board (PCB) in a computer. It is the central communication backbone connectivity point through which all components and external peripherals connect. Functions: Component Integration: The motherboard houses the CPU, memory (RAM), and provides connectors for other peripherals like the graphics card, hard drives, and optical drives.
